canonical_question: Kubernetes reference: basic Deployment + Service + Ingress
aliases: Kubernetes networking basics deployment to ingress
how to deploy and expose an app on Kubernetes
k8s service types ClusterIP NodePort LoadBalancer

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Ingress API frozen (networking.k8s.io/v1 GA since k8s 1.19); community Ingress NGINX retiring March 2026

constraints: An Ingress controller MUST be deployed in the cluster for Ingress resources to have any effect
Always use apps/v1 for Deployments and networking.k8s.io/v1 for Ingress
spec.selector in Deployment is immutable after creation
Never use the :latest image tag in production
Resource requests and limits MUST be set on production Pods
The Ingress API is frozen; use Gateway API for new greenfield projects

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Need to configure Gateway API (HTTPRoute, Gateway) instead of Ingress
Need Helm chart packaging or Kustomize overlays
Need to configure HPA or VPA autoscaling

inputs_needed.question: How do you need to expose your application?
Which Ingress controller are you using?
